title: Sum of Array Elements (Fixed Size)
code:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){ int arr[5]={1,2,3,4,5},sum=0; for(int i=0;i<5;i++) sum+=arr[i]; printf("Sum = %d",sum); return 0; }

Pointer Arithmetic
code:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){ int arr[3]={10,20,30}; int *p=arr; p++; printf("%d",*p); return 0; }

title: File Append Example
code:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){ FILE *f=fopen("data.txt","a"); fprintf(f,"\nNew line added"); fclose(f); printf("Data appended"); return 0; }
